item.title: Long-lived photon blockade with weak optical nonlinearity
item.description:
📚 npj Quantum Information
👤 You Wang, Xu Zheng, Timothy C. H. Liew, Y. D. Chong
npj Quantum Information, Published online: 20 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41534-026-01293-0 Long-lived photon blockade with weak optical nonlinearity
